Uses of Class
processor.io.stimulustech.filequeue.QueueProcessorBuilder

Packages that use QueueProcessorBuilder
Package
Description
io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
 

  • Uses of QueueProcessorBuilder in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor

    Methods in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor that return QueueProcessorBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static QueueProcessorBuilder<FileQueueItem>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.builder()
    Creates an empty builder.
    static <T1 extends FileQueueItem>
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T1>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.builder(String queueName, Path queuePath, Class<T1> type, Consumer<T1> consumer, ExecutorService executor)
    Creates a pre-populated builder with all mandatory fields set.
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.consumer(Consumer<? super T> consumer)
    Sets the consumer callback that processes items dequeued from the queue.
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.executorService(ExecutorService executorService)
    Sets the ExecutorService used to dispatch item-processing tasks.
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.expiration(Expiration<T> expiration)
    Sets the expiration handler invoked when an item exceeds the maximum number of delivery attempts.
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.maxQueueSize(int maxQueueSize)
    Sets the maximum number of items the queue will hold in memory before blocking.
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.maxRetryDelay(int maxRetryDelay)
    Sets the maximum delay between retries when exponential back-off is enabled, expressed in retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.maxTries(int maxTries)
    Sets the maximum number of delivery attempts before an item is considered expired.
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.objectMapper(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper)
    Supplies a custom ObjectMapper for serialising and deserialising queue items.
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.persistRetryDelay(int persistRetryDelay)
    Sets the interval at which items persisted to disk are re-examined for reprocessing, expressed in persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit persistRetryDelayUnit)
    Sets the time unit for persistRetryDelay(int).
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.queueName(String queueName)
    Sets a human-readable name for the queue.
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.queuePath(Path queuePath)
    Sets the path to the queue database directory.
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.retryDelay(int retryDelay)
    Sets the fixed delay between delivery attempts, expressed in retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.retryDelayAlgorithm(QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm retryDelayAlgorithm)
    Sets the retry delay algorithm.
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit retryDelayUnit)
    Sets the time unit for retryDelay(int) and maxRetryDelay(int).
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.type(Class<? extends T> type)
    Sets the class of items stored in the queue.
